entry.title: 🟢 Hello, ABAP Cloud!
entry.content:
ABAP Cloud is out there! But what does it mean for you? What is the impact for classic ABAP developers? What does it mean for Newbies? And what's in for developers that are already familiar with ADT, CDS and RAP?

In this session, we'll share insights into how we plan to improve the development experience and lower the barrier of entry into ABAP Cloud for all developers in the near future.

Speakers:

Marcel Hermanns, SAP

Volker Drees, SAP

After watching the session, be sure to complete the validation tutorial to earn points for Devtoberfest! https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/devtoberfest2023-week3-abap-cap-helloabapcloud.html 

Presentation available here: coming soon

entry.title: 🟢 Custom Code Adaptation to SAP S/4HANA and ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
In this session you will learn how to handle your ABAP custom code after an SAP S/4HANA system conversion with regard to clean core including different options: from retirement of the unused code and adaptation for SAP S/4HANA to renovation and innovation with ABAP Cloud. The well-known tools Custom Code Migration app, ABAP development tools with Quick Fixes and ABAP test cockpit support you during all relevant analysis and adaptation tasks.

Speakers:

Olga Dolinskaja, SAP

Thomas Fiedler, SAP

Link to the validation tutorial : https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/devtoberfest2023-week4-abap-cap-customcodeadaptation.html

Link to the presentation: https://dam.sap.com/mac/app/p/pdf/asset/preview/HdpNjQq?ltr=a&rc=10

entry.title: 🟢 Explore ABAP Profiling with the ABAP Development Tools
entry.content:
ABAP Trace, ABAP Cross Trace, and ABAP Dynamic Logpoints are powerful tools that assist developers in analyzing and troubleshooting ABAP applications. These tools enable the identification of performance issues, understanding of program interactions, and efficient debugging, ultimately leading to improved application quality and performance.

Speaker:

Ingo Bräuninger, SAP

After watching the session, be sure to complete the validation tutorial to earn points for Devtoberfest! https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/devtoberfest2023-week4-abap-cap-abapprofiling.html 

Presentation available here: https://d.dam.sap.com/a/94UPCcM/Devtober_ABAP_Profiling.pdf?rc=10

entry.title: 🟢 Cloud API Enablement on SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private editions
entry.content:
Using released APIs in your custom code to interact with SAP development objects is a main aspect of ABAP Cloud. But what to do if a released API is missing? In this session we will present the recently published Cloud API Enablement Guidelines for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition, and SAP S/4HANA, complemented by a short demo.

Link to the Presentation used in today’s session https://d.dam.sap.com/a/4E56M5N?rc=10 

After watching the session, be sure to complete the validation tutorial to earn points for Devtoberfest! 

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/devtoberfest2023-week4-abap-cap-cloudapienablement.html

Speakers:

Alexander Rother, SAP

Kai Dehmann, SAP

entry.title: 🟢 Consume SAP S/4HANA or SAP S/4HANA Cloud Events Using SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
In this session, you will develop an SAP BTP full-stack application based on CAP using SAP Business Application Studio productivity tools. The application will consume a new business partner created in SAP S/4HANA or SAP S/4HANA Cloud and will create it in SAP BTP for approval.
See Add SAP S/4HANA or SAP S/4HANA Cloud Events.

Speaker:

Yuval Morad, SAP

After watching the session, be sure to complete the validation tutorial to earn points for Devtoberfest! https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/devtoberfest2023-week3-abap-cap-s4hanacloudevents.html

Presentation available here: https://d.dam.sap.com/a/4fLV1u4?rc=10

entry.title: 🟢 SAP BTP ABAP Environment – How to Build a Multitenancy SaaS Application
entry.content:
SAP BTP, ABAP environment is the Platform-as-a-Service for ABAP developers. A cloud-optimized ABAP platform based on SAP HANA that serves as a development and runtime environment for cloud apps. This session give you an update about the latest product news and a live demo on how to build a multi-tenancy SaaS application.

Speaker:

Frank Jentsch

entry.title: 🟢 Boost your Developer Experience for CAP Java Development
entry.content:
In this session we will show you how to efficiently develop applications with CAP Java. Starting from the IDE setup with IntelliJ Idea and VS Code we’ll continue with basic debugging workflow inside the IDE. From there we showcase the optimized development turnaround using Spring Boot developer tools and Testcontainers.

Speaker:

Robin de Silva Jayasinghe, SAP

Link to the validation tutorial : https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/devtoberfest2023-week2-abap-capjava.html
